summary: Vendored API security plane: ALE, ECDSA request signing, JWT bearer auth, PBKDF2 hashing, envelope encryption, RLS, rate limiting.
userSteps: Set ConnectionStrings__Default to your PostgreSQL instance (docker compose up starts one).
Generate secrets with `ctx0 keygen` and set the printed Ctx__Ale__*, Ctx__Jwt__* and Ctx__Envelope__* variables via the environment.
